creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to martin from comment #6)

Please make a pull request upstream, and link the issue here. While I generally prefer new bugs for this situation, since you've already reopened this one, let's use it to track the issue upstream. If they merge it soon, I'll reimport. If they say they'll merge it but take a while, then I'll make a local change and drop it when it actually gets merged.

Thanks for spotting this!
